title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!
